itemListElement.reviewBody:
I have attended many of their annual programs over the past ten years. These are very nicely coordinated and choreographed. Eminent personalities address the parents giving them valuable tips on bringing up children. The children seem to enjoy these programs and perform very nicely and sweetly. The teachers must be putting in lot of effort for delivering these programs. Parents also seem to be very satisfied with the school as I have never heard any negative things about the school or it's teachers.
The school is quite meticulous in its handling of the children in their class and during play times. They undertake many activities which help them to learn many behavioral aspects and makes them quite social through these group activities.
I wish the school a great success and hope it continues in its journey to shape young children to cope with the challenges of the regular schools

itemReviewed.name: St. Stephen's Public School - Salt Lake

itemListElement.reviewBody:
As a parents, we are feeling blessed to be a part of the school family. On my experience, some key features of the school which may satisfied to enroll kids:
1. 15th years of the school legacy.
2. Montessori curriculum for Nursery and KG.
3. Extracurricular activities specially for YOGA
4. Location - prime location very nearer to the so many Government quarters.
5. Controlled access for safety and security of kids.
6. A healthy and hygienic study place.
7.  A dedicated team of highly experienced and caring teaching staffs & mentors.
8. A very reasonable and affordable school fees. etc
9. Very well managed and executed events from time to time.
I  would like to extend my gratitude towards school and also wish hope that these extended efforts would continue.

itemReviewed.name: St. Stephen's Public School - Salt Lake

itemListElement.reviewBody: I am extremely happy with St. Stephen's Public School, Salt Lake. The teachers are caring, patient, and truly invested in the children's growth. The curriculum is well-structured, ensuring a strong academic foundation while also encouraging creativity and moral values. Children enjoy going to school every day, which speaks volumes about the positive and engaging environment. The school maintains good discipline while also making learning fun. I highly recommend it to any parent looking for a great start to their child’s education.

itemReviewed.name: St. Stephen's Public School - Salt Lake

itemListElement.reviewBody: A very good school where all the kids get expertise attention.They seek to find the best in every child.

itemListElement.reviewBody: I am very satisfied with this school. The teachers as well as the staff here are very commendable. My child has grown a lot in a short time.very very thank full this school

itemReviewed.name: St. Stephen's Public School - Salt Lake

itemListElement.reviewBody: I'm thrilled to share our outstanding experience with St. Stephen's Public School ! As a parent, it's heartwarming to see my son thrive in a nurturing environment that fosters social, emotional, and cognitive growth. The teachers are very caring and experienced  here . They engage children in various activities like promoting creativity , problem - solving , and friendship skills .  The St. Stephen's Public School has exceeded our expectations in every way. I feel grateful  to the community for my son's early educational journey.

itemReviewed.name: St. Stephen's Public School - Salt Lake

itemListElement.reviewBody:
St Stephen's Public School salt lake, aims at all round development of a child. It provides a happy inspirational environment where focus is not only given to studies but also to co curricular activities such as dance, yoga, arts and craft, recitation and many more.
I would like to thank our respectable Principal ma'am, for her guidance and perseverance, and for giving me the chance to be a part of this esteemed institution.
